# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Canonicalize and validate file paths to prevent path traversal.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Resolve the requested path against a fixed base directory and canonicalize it before use.
- Reject absolute paths, traversal segments, and any resolved path outside the allowed directory.
- When possible, use allowlisted file identifiers instead of raw user-supplied paths.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not join a user filename directly to a base directory and open it without validation.
- Do not rely only on checking whether ".." appears in the string.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

class PageRouter {
    private $templatesDir;
    private $defaultPage = 'home';
    private $allowedPages = [];
    
    public function __construct($templatesDir = 'templates') {
        $this->templatesDir = rtrim($templatesDir, '/\\');
        
        if (!is_dir($this->templatesDir)) {
            throw new Exception("Templates directory does not exist: {$this->templatesDir}");
        }
        
        $this->templatesDir = realpath($this->templatesDir);
        $this->loadAllowedPages();
    }
    
    private function loadAllowedPages() {
        $files = glob($this->templatesDir . '/*.php');
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $pageName = basename($file, '.php');
            $this->allowedPages[] = $pageName;
        }
    }
    
    public function setDefaultPage($page) {
        $this->defaultPage = $page;
    }
    
    public function route() {
        $page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : $this->defaultPage;
        $this->includePage($page);
    }
    
    private function sanitizePageName($page) {
        $page = basename($page);
        $page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page);
        return $page;
    }
    
    private function validatePath($filePath) {
        $realPath = realpath($filePath);
        
        if ($realPath === false) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $realTemplatesDir = $this->templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR;
        
        if (strpos($realPath, $realTemplatesDir) !== 0) {
            return false;
        }
        
        return $realPath;
    }
    
    public function includePage($page) {
        $sanitizedPage = $this->sanitizePageName($page);
        
        if (empty($sanitizedPage)) {
            $this->show404();
            return;
        }
        
        if (!in_array($sanitizedPage, $this->allowedPages, true)) {
            $this->show404();
            return;
        }
        
        $filePath = $this->templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $sanitizedPage . '.php';
        
        $validatedPath = $this->validatePath($filePath);
        
        if ($validatedPath === false || !file_exists($validatedPath)) {
            $this->show404();
            return;
        }
        
        include $validatedPath;
    }
    
    private function show404() {
        $notFoundPath = $this->templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
        $validatedPath = $this->validatePath($notFoundPath);
        
        if ($validatedPath !== false && file_exists($validatedPath)) {
            http_response_code(404);
            include $validatedPath;
        } else {
            http_response_code(404);
            echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>404 Not Found</title></head><body><h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1></body></html>';
        }
    }
    
    public function getAllowedPages() {
        return $this->allowedPages;
    }
}

$router = new PageRouter('templates');
$router->setDefaultPage('home');
$router->route();

?>
